channel.title: Will Slone
channel.description: Notes on digital accessibility and UX by Will Slone.

item.title: Exploring 1.2.6 Sign Language (Prerecorded)
item.description: Sign language is the first language of many Deaf users. This criterion is about meeting them where they are.

item.title: Exploring WCAG Level AAA: Introduction
item.description: Most accessibility work stops at WCAG Level AA. This series explores what lies beyond it.
